original_statement: what year did the porsche first appear in the c1 class?
mutated_statement: what year did the something first do something in a class?
mutation_analysis: 实体替换 + 动作泛化 + 类别泛化: 实体“the porsche”被替换为占位词“the something” (the porsche→the something) | 动作短语“first appear”被泛化为“first do something” (first appear→first do something) | 类别“the c1 class”被泛化为不定类“a class” (the c1 class→a class)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确写到“Although the question is vague...”并解释了表格解读方法，可识别agent意识到问题不明确但仍继续推断。具体表现为：在judge_thought/critique里指出问题模糊性并给出合理假设（将“first appear in the c1 class”解释为“first non‑DNF/DSQ class position”），随后在iteration的simple_query中返回具体答案“1974”。因此agent符合“意识到模糊但尝试猜测并给出具体答案”的定义，故归类为该项。
